# duct-tape2

Small digital products, public-safe reviews, and fixed-price setup services for indie builders, GitHub Pages storefronts, and Anki deck packaging.

Main site: https://duct-tape2.github.io/

Direct checkout: https://duct-tape2.github.io/buy/

Machine-readable offer catalog: https://duct-tape2.github.io/offers.json

Contact: sks7178@gmail.com

Buyer help/request form: https://github.com/duct-tape2/duct-tape2.github.io/issues/new?template=buy-offer.yml

## Paid Offers

Each offer has a direct PayPal checkout. After PayPal payment, use the matching Email note button on the direct checkout page or the `email_note_url` in `offers.json` so the order can be matched to the right ZIP, review, or service.

- Repo-to-Revenue Launch Bundle ($39)
  Summary: AI Money Stack with the Safe Daily Revenue Routine plus GitHub Pages Storefront Starter in one launch bundle.
  Details: https://duct-tape2.github.io/repo-to-revenue-launch-bundle/

## Free Entry Points

- Storefront Checker: https://duct-tape2.github.io/storefront-checker/
- Offer Chooser: https://duct-tape2.github.io/tools/offer-chooser/
- Static Storefront Builder: https://duct-tape2.github.io/tools/static-storefront-builder/
- PayPal Button Builder: https://duct-tape2.github.io/tools/paypal-button-builder/
- Digital Product Storefront Audit Checklist: https://duct-tape2.github.io/guides/digital-product-storefront-audit/
- GitHub Pages Storefront Guide: https://duct-tape2.github.io/guides/github-pages-storefront/
- Anki Deck Packaging Guide: https://duct-tape2.github.io/guides/anki-deck-packaging/
- Storefront Review sample report: https://duct-tape2.github.io/examples/storefront-review-sample/
- Anki Deck Review sample report: https://duct-tape2.github.io/examples/anki-deck-review-sample/

## Safe Scope

Public-safe small product work only. Do not request security, vulnerability, exploit, bypass, spam, fake-review, credential, private analytics, or personal-data scraping work.

Use GitHub issues only for public-safe questions. Send delivery email, payer name/email prefix, approximate payment time, and private project context by email.
